source.name: BHCIP Awardees (Rounds 1-5 + Bond Rounds 1-2)
source.publisher: DHCS / Advocates for Human Potential (program administrator)

cadence: manual re-capture when new BHCIP rounds are announced
caveats: Awardee names, projects, and rounds only — per-project dollar amounts are published by DHCS/AHP in round announcements (PDF/web), not yet machine-readable here.
Snapshot captured from AHP's public Tableau dashboard 2026-07-16; it reflects grantee self-reported project data.
BHCIP money reaches these entities through AHP, a private third-party administrator — this hop exists in no state accounting dataset, which is why we recovered it from the program's own reporting.
